mapper.select: SELECT mr.id AS id, mr.name AS name, mr.description AS description, mr.app_id AS app_id, mr.status as status, mr.create_time as createTime FROM md_role mr JOIN md_tenant_role mtr ON mr.id = mtr.role_id WHERE mtr.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND mtr.app_id = #{appId} GROUP BY mr.id ORDER BY mr.create_time ASC
